title: helianthemum laeve
intro: Helianthemum laeve, also known as smooth rockrose, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is native to Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, thanks to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Helianthemum laeve can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used topically in creams and ointments to promote skin healing and reduce inflammation.
